{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27777","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27777/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27777/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27777/events","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/27777","id":2663797248,"node_id":"I_kwDOAA3dP86exlIA","number":27777,"title":"BUG: WRITABLE flag is wrongly set after advanced indexing of a read-only numpy.memmap array","user":{"login":"cnliao","id":15000700,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjE1MDAwNzAw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/15000700?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/cnliao","html_url":"https://github.com/cnliao","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/cnliao/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/cnliao/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/cnliao/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/cnliao/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/cnliao/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/cnliao/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/cnliao/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/cnliao/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/cnliao/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"labels":[{"id":6359214,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWw2MzU5MjE0","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/labels/00%20-%20Bug","name":"00 - Bug","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":null}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-11-16T04:55:23Z","updated_at":"2024-11-16T04:55:23Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Describe the issue:

According to doc "advanced indexing" should return a copy. Most users expect the copy to be writable.

When advanced indexing is applied against an array that comes from a mmapped files opened in read-only mode, the WRITABLE flag on the resulting copy from advanced indexing is incorrectly set to `False`.

### Reproduce the code example:

```python
import numpy as np

fn = "/tmp/bug1.npy"
x = np.memmap(fn, dtype="i8", shape=(5,), mode="w+")
x[:] = np.arange(5)
x = np.memmap(fn, dtype="i8", shape=(5,), mode="r")
y = x[[True, True, False, True, False]]
y[:] = 99  # ValueError: assignment destination is read-only
# y.base[:] = 99  # this works
# y.setflags(write=True); y.base[:] = 99  # this also works
```


### Error message:

```shell
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "reproducenumpyflagmmapbug.py", line 8, in <module>
    y[:] = 99  # ValueError: assignment destination is read-only
ValueError: assignment destination is read-only
```


### Python and NumPy Versions:

1.21.6
1.26.0
